query: US Senate roll call votes 119th Congress 2nd session June 2026 current count
answer:
Now I have comprehensive data. Let me compile the full research report.

## US Senate Roll Call Votes — 119th Congress, 2nd Session (2026)

### Current Count

As of **June 15, 2026**, the US Senate has held **172 roll call votes** in the 2nd Session of the 119th Congress. The session began on **January 5, 2026** (Vote #1) and the most recent recorded vote is **Vote #172** on **June 15, 2026**.

For context, the 1st Session (2025) of the 119th Congress totaled **659 roll call votes**.

### Most Recent Vote

- **Vote #172** (June 15, 2026): **Nomination Confirmed** — Justin D. Smith, of Missouri, to be United States Circuit Judge for the Eighth Circuit. Passed 48–43.

### Vote Categories Breakdown (2nd Session)

| Category | Count |
|---|---|
| Procedural | 72 |
| Cloture | 47 |
| Nomination | 32 |
| Amendment | 13 |
| Passage | 8 |
| **Total** | **172** |

### Vote Results Distribution

| Result | Count |
|---|---|
| Motion Rejected | 33 |
| Nomination Confirmed | 32 |
| Cloture Motion Agreed to | 32 |
| Motion to Proceed Rejected | 12 |
| Amendment Rejected | 11 |
| Motion to Discharge Rejected | 9 |
| Cloture on the Motion to Proceed Rejected | 8 |
| Motion to Proceed Agreed to | 8 |
| Motion to Table Agreed to | 6 |
| Bill Passed | 4 |
| Cloture Motion Rejected | 4 |
| Cloture on Motion to Proceed Agreed to | 3 |
| Motion to Discharge Agreed to | 2 |
| Point of Order Well Taken | 2 |
| Joint Resolution Passed | 2 |
| Amendment Agreed to | 2 |
| Concurrent Resolution Agreed to | 1 |
| Resolution Agreed to | 1 |

### Monthly Breakdown

| Month | Votes |
|---|---|
| January 2026 | 20 |
| February 2026 | 23 |
| March 2026 | 31 |
| April 2026 | 39 |
| May 2026 | 17 |
| June 2026 (through 6/15) | 42 |

### Notable Observations

- **June is the busiest month so far**, with 42 votes in just 15 days — largely driven by a burst of amendment and procedural votes on June 5 related to the reconciliation bill (S. 2 / "One Big Beautiful Bill Act") and subsequent judicial nominations.
- **Nominations dominate**: 32 confirmed nominations plus 32 related cloture votes account for a significant portion of activity.
- **Passage votes are limited**: Only 4 bills, 2 joint resolutions, 1 concurrent resolution, and 1 resolution have passed.
- **May was the slowest month** with only 17 votes, suggesting a recess or lighter schedule.

### Data Sources

- **GovTrack.us API** (`/api/v2/vote/`) — primary source for vote counts and metadata
- **VoteView (UCLA)** — corroborating roll call data with additional ideological dimension scores

key_facts: The US Senate has conducted 172 roll call votes in the 119th Congress, 2nd Session as of June 15, 2026.
The 2nd Session began January 5, 2026 (Vote #1) and the most recent vote is #172 on June 15, 2026.
The 1st Session (2025) of the 119th Congress had 659 total roll call votes.
The most recent vote (#172) confirmed Justin D. Smith as US Circuit Judge for the Eighth Circuit, 48-43.
Vote categories: Procedural (72), Cloture (47), Nomination (32), Amendment (13), Passage (8).
June 2026 is the busiest month with 42 votes in the first 15 days, driven by reconciliation bill activity and judicial nominations.
May 2026 was the slowest month with only 17 votes.
A major burst of votes occurred on June 5, 2026 related to the reconciliation bill (S. 2 / 'One Big Beautiful Bill Act') with numerous amendment and procedural votes.
32 nominations have been confirmed in the 2nd Session; only 4 bills and 2 joint resolutions have passed.
33 motions were rejected — the most common single result category.
